en.short: The first fragment has **O(n²)** complexity and the second fragment has **O(log n)** complexity.
en.exam:
# Solution

## Fragment 1

The first loop executes **n** times, so it takes **O(n)** time.

The second part contains two nested loops.

```text
Outer loop = n
Inner loop = n
```

Therefore:

```text
O(n × n) = O(n²)
```

Total complexity:

```text
O(n) + O(n²) = O(n²)
```

## Fragment 2

The value of `i` doubles in every iteration.

```text
1, 2, 4, 8, ... , n
```

After `k` iterations:

```text
2^k = n
```

Therefore:

```text
k = log₂ n
```

Hence time complexity is **O(log n)**.
en.detailed:
# Detailed Solution

## First Program Fragment

The first loop initializes array elements and executes exactly `n` times.

```text
T(n) = n = O(n)
```

The next part has nested loops. The outer loop runs `n` times and for each outer iteration, the inner loop also runs `n` times.

```text
n × n = n²
```

So the nested part is **O(n²)**. The total complexity is:

```text
O(n) + O(n²) = O(n²)
```

## Second Program Fragment

Here `i` starts from 1 and is multiplied by 2 each time.

```text
1, 2, 4, 8, 16, ...
```

If the loop runs `k` times, then `2^k = n`, so `k = log₂ n`. Therefore the complexity is **O(log n)**.

hi-en.short: First fragment की complexity **O(n²)** है और second fragment की complexity **O(log n)** है.
hi-en.exam:
# Solution

## Fragment 1

First loop **n times** run होता है, इसलिए इसका time **O(n)** होगा.

Second part में nested loops हैं.

```text
Outer loop = n
Inner loop = n
```

इसलिए:

```text
O(n × n) = O(n²)
```

Total complexity:

```text
O(n) + O(n²) = O(n²)
```

## Fragment 2

`i` हर iteration में double होता है.

```text
1, 2, 4, 8, ... , n
```

अगर loop `k` times run करता है:

```text
2^k = n
```

इसलिए:

```text
k = log₂ n
```

Hence time complexity **O(log n)** होगी.
hi-en.detailed:
# Detailed Solution

## First Program Fragment

First loop array elements को initialize करता है और exactly `n` times execute होता है.

```text
T(n) = n = O(n)
```

Next part में nested loops हैं. Outer loop `n` times run होता है और हर outer iteration के लिए inner loop भी `n` times run होता है.

```text
n × n = n²
```

So nested part की complexity **O(n²)** होगी. Total complexity:

```text
O(n) + O(n²) = O(n²)
```

## Second Program Fragment

यहाँ `i` 1 से start होता है और हर iteration में 2 से multiply होता है.

```text
1, 2, 4, 8, 16, ...
```

अगर loop `k` times run करता है, then `2^k = n`, so `k = log₂ n`. इसलिए complexity **O(log n)** होगी.
